# clang trunk: assertion "getType() == Other.getType()" in TypeLoc::initializeFullCopy during Sema of typedef with malformed array bound expression

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173877
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-30T01:40:02Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/oT4bsohdG

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer
